narrative:
Bokescreek Twp township has 917 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.6 percentage points.
